creator: pozar@lns.com
text:
Looks fine by me.  What do I need to do to address this?  Should I
resubmit my package?

Tim

On Mon, Apr 16, 2007 at 02:41:33AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/tuneradio,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/111692 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111692
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
